hero.headline: Plug Wells. Mint Tokens. Test-Alana Headline
hero.description: Where onshore well plugging meets cryptocurrency. For every US onshore well plugged, one new CAPIT token is minted. Follow the real-time progress of well plugging efforts nationwide. Test-Alana Hero description edited in Tina CMS localhost:3000/admin/index.html

educationalCards.title: What is a Plugged Well? (TEST-Alana)
educationalCards.description: Our CAPIT tokens represent plugged, abandoned, capped wells, building a set of verifiable environmental data.

educationalCards.title: Why Does Plugging Wells Matter?
educationalCards.description: Plugging reduces methane and protects groundwater, contributing to environmental protection and public health.

educationalCards.title: How Many Inactive Wells Remain?
educationalCards.description: Estimated 12,000 inactive wells at risk across the US. Approximately 97,000+ wells need to be plugged.
educationalCards.imageAlt: Map showing inactive wells across US
